description: Style Notefrench connection's Spring Summer bag collection indulges in a delicious crystal and sequin fest, perfectly capturing the season's vibrancy. Maximize the impact of this piece with a monochrome dress and don't forget to accessorize tonally! Product Details Gold clutch that has a purse clasp and two inner pockets Material and CareBlended Wipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Size Height: 11.5 cm Width: 17 cm
